description_long: This is a large, freestanding storage unit combining a tall shelving section and a multi-door cabinet. The left side features open wooden shelves, ideal for storing books, shoes, or display items, with a natural wood finish. The right section consists of three tall, white cabinet doors with minimalist black handles, likely concealing additional shelves or hanging space inside. The top and sides of the unit alternate between wood and white finishes, giving it a modern, two-tone appearance. The back is fully enclosed with a wood panel, while the front is defined by the clean lines of the doors and open shelving. This piece is substantial in size and would be suitable for use in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, garages, or communal spaces.
description: A large, modern storage unit with open wooden shelves on one side and three tall white cabinet doors with black handles on the other, featuring a two-tone wood and white finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the unit and the wood paneling on the shelving section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open wooden shelves on the left and three white cabinet doors with black handles on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the white paneling and the top surfaces of both the cabinet and shelving sections.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full wood panel back and the white cabinet section.
